steps.observed: ok: false, error.code: PRESET_NOT_FOUND, error.hint: "Use 'mapj protheus preset list' to see available presets"

steps.action: Run preset without providing required parameter
steps.observed: ok: false, error.code: MISSING_PARAMETER, error.message: "missing required parameters: name", error.hint: "Provide values: --param name=value"

assertions.title: Preset Run - Connection Failed

steps.action: Run preset with required parameter but no connection available
steps.expected: Error with code CONNECTION_FAILED, retryable: true
steps.observed: ok: false, error.code: NO_CONNECTION, error.message: "no Protheus connection available", retryable: false

assertions.issues: Error code mismatch: assertion expects CONNECTION_FAILED with retryable: true, but got NO_CONNECTION with retryable: false. The distinction matters: NO_CONNECTION means no connection profile exists at all, while CONNECTION_FAILED implies a profile exists but connection attempt failed.

assertions.title: Preset Run - Query Validation Failed

steps.observed: Preset 'g7-delete-query' created successfully with DELETE query

steps.action: Attempt to run preset to trigger query validation
steps.observed: Cannot reach query validation - NO_CONNECTION error occurs first

assertions.issues: Query validation (ValidateReadOnly) happens at runtime after connection is established. Without a database connection, cannot test query validation failure. The preset creation itself does not validate query type.

frictions.description: Parameter definition format in --param-def flag was not immediately clear from help. Format is 'name:type[:default][:description]' with no explicit 'required' field - a parameter without default is automatically required.
frictions.resolution: Created preset without providing default value to make parameter required

blockers.description: No Protheus database connection available for query execution tests
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Checked for existing connection profiles with 'connection list' - none found

summary: Tested 9 assertions: 2 passed (VAL-CLI-015, VAL-CLI-016), 1 failed (VAL-CLI-017 - error code mismatch), 6 blocked (VAL-CLI-010 to VAL-CLI-014, VAL-CLI-018 - require database connection).
